title: Spectrite
body:
This mod adds a new and extremely rare ore to the game: Spectrite. It can be used to craft unique items, armor, and weapons with powerful stats. A set of Spectrite items imparts powerful effects to your character, allowing you to wreak havoc on everyone left and right.

![new buildings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5027c235b5533facc37266ff2879c093cf09715e_0.webp)![adds new types of chests](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d579cf69cf9b895e8c91809ef0f8b392ca2b03e_0.webp)![This is what the armor will look like](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08d6f4e7bc6f19c8ece79b5b08419e73c0176180.png)
